action: The release pipeline's own preflight (boot-smoke probes) drops a bridge log at the repo root (evolve.log), and the release ship's broad stage then sweeps that untracked file into the release commit — v18.3.0 commit 561f78ff includes a 22-line evolve.log of the preflight's claude-tmux/codex-tmux boot-smoke output. Same bug class as the cover.out sweep (INTEGRITY_TREE_DRIFT, cycle-152): pipeline-generated untracked residue + stage -A. evolve.log is now gitignored (233d302e) which closes this specific file, but the structural fix is for release preflight to write its bridge log under .evolve/ (already ignored) instead of the repo root, or for the release ship stage to stage explicit paths (the version-bump/changelog file set is known). Acceptance: a release run on a tree with arbitrary untracked root files commits ONLY the known version-bump set.
evidence_pointer: git show 561f78ff --stat (evolve.log +22); .gitignore remediation in 233d302e; precedent: cover.out gitignore comment (cycle-152)
